title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Sanji, Sentomaru, Unknown person #14, Vegapunk as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lilth, use general frankly to get the ship outta danger!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Urgent update!! Dr. vegapunk is attempting...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to leave the Labo- stratum and head down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahm standin' by to deactivate the frontier dome! We can reseal it in a jiffy, right after they pass!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is an override command from VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to eradicate every last marine on the Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Are the tides about to turn?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 18 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
